title: Dreamy Gooey Tunisian Vegetable Wrap
description: A malty, gooey, and cozy Tunisian dish featuring Thai red curry paste, served in a ssam-wrap and cooked on a hot-stone-plate, perfect for vegetarians.
instructions: Preheat the hot-stone-plate to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, mix together the grated carrots, sliced zucchini, sliced eggplant, and chopped onion.
In a small bowl, whisk together the Thai red curry paste, malted barley flour, olive oil, salt, and black pepper.
Add the curry paste mixture to the vegetable mixture and stir until the vegetables are well coated.
Place a ssam wrap on a flat surface and spoon about 1/2 cup of the vegetable mixture onto the center of the wrap.
Fold the bottom half of the wrap up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll the wrap up tightly.
Place the wrap on the preheated hot-stone-plate and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, until the wrap is crispy and the filling is heated through.
Serve the wraps hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
